title: G+ | Copper and Rose Gold tools
description:
Two new sets of tools for copper, finally!
[GearPlus]
body:
![Project Title: "GearPlus: Copper tools module"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0937642b5d86c62859a82df75f26e79a38694d8_0.webp)
---
### Resource Pack needed to correctly view the items and tools!
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T81FJU3R)
---

GearPlus is a group of small Data Packs that focuses on adding tools, weapons or armor to Minecraft to thematically and aesthetically diversify the range of acquirable gear without breaking the balance of the vanilla game experience.

The Copper and Rose Gold tools module does exactly what it says, adding:
- Craftable **Copper tools**;
- **Rose Gold**, a new material obtainable by combining Copper and Gold;
- Craftable **Rose Gold tools**;

![From left to right: Copper Sword, Copper Pickaxe, Copper Axe, Copper Shovel, Copper Hoe, Rose Gold Ingot, Rose Gold Sword, Rose Gold Pickaxe, Rose Gold Axe, Rose Gold Shovel, Rose Gold Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e317becd4dca9589f5ff054c473a6462887a915b.png)

---
Copper tools have the same durability of Wooden tools (60) and can mine the same blocks of Iron tools, with the exception of Diamond Ores for Copper Pickaxes. They can be repaired using Copper Ingots.

Both Copper tools and Golden tools can be upgraded in a Smithing Table with a Gold Nugget and a Rose Gold Ingot to obtain Rose Gold tools.

Rose Gold tools are similar to Iron tools, but mine slightly faster and have slightly more durability. They can be repaired using a material of choice between Copper, Gold and Rose Gold.

---
### Installation
To properly view and use the module, both the Data Pack and the Resource Pack must be installed.

To manually install the Data Pack, simply drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'datapack' folder inside your world folder.
To manually install the required Resource Pack, drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'resourcepacks' folder inside your main MC directory.

The module is extremely lightweight and is compatible with Multiplayer, as long as the Resource Pack is correctly loaded.

Currently supported versions: 1.21.2+

---
### Support 
If you like my Data Packs, Resource Packs or textures, consider **donating**, it would really mean a lot to me. If you are interested in **commissioning** any content, **contact me** on any available platform, I'll try to reach out to you as fast as I can.

**Suggestions** for future Minecraft content are also well received. Thank you for taking a look at my content. :)
